source_formulae: P0R03570: Intrinsic Existence: Psi field is fundamental | Composition: 15-layer hierarchical structure | Information: Each layer has distinct states | Integration: UPDE couples all layers | Exclusion: Quasicriticality selects dominant scale
P0R03572: Fig.: IIT axioms mapped onto SCPN structures (Psi-field, 15-layer composition, information, UPDE integration, quasicritical exclusion/scale selection).
P0R03574: Fig.: Integration architecture showing per layer, UPDE in the core, and MIP across boundaries, unifying IIT measures with SCPN dynamics.
P0R03575: Mapping Geometric Properties to Experiential Qualities

P0R03576: Source Material: The specific proposed mappings: Curvature as emotional valence, Torsion as dissonance or surprise, Topological Complexity (Betti numbers) as the richness of experience, and Manifold Volume as the intensity of consciousness.
P0R03578: Operationalising the Hypothesis: Topological Data Analysis (TDA) and Qualia Capacity (Q)

P0R03579: Source Material: The methodological section detailing how TDA can be used on neural and other data to reconstruct the topology of the consciousness manifold and calculate a concrete, measurable value for its complexity, the Qualia Capacity (Q).
